用于标记对应类或参数的配置路径
Configuration - Interface in cc.carm.lib.configuration.core
The root interface of the configuration file interfaces, which is used to label and record the configuration information.

ConfigurationProvider<W extends ConfigurationWrapper<?>> - Class in cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source

The root node of the configuration file class, which is used to label and record the configuration information.

InlineComment - Annotation Type in cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.annotation
行内注释，用于给对应配置的所在行添加注释，便于使用者阅读查看。
inlineComments - Variable in class cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source.ConfigurationComments

isExpired(long) - Method in class cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source.ConfigurationProvider
用于 CachedConfigValue 判断缓存值是否过期(即缓存的时间早于配置文件的最后加载时间)。
